item.title: Engineers India Joins Mojo Stocks List Following Robust Quarterly Performance
item.description: Engineers India, a small-cap player in the construction sector, has been added to the prestigious Mojo Stocks list as of 29 April 2026, reflecting its robust financial turnaround and promising growth trajectory. The stock’s recent quarterly results have demonstrated exceptional performance, prompting a bullish outlook and positioning it as a compelling investment opportunity within the small-cap universe. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Bansal Wire Industries Q4 FY26: Margin Pressures Offset Strong Revenue Growth
item.description: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd., a small-cap manufacturer of steel wire products with a market capitalisation of ₹4,773.00 crores, reported mixed results for the quarter ended March 2026, as robust revenue expansion failed to translate into commensurate profit growth. The company posted a consolidated net profit of ₹40.07 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a 7.40% sequential decline from ₹43.27 crores in Q3 FY26, though the figure represented a healthy 21.02% year-on-year improvement over ₹33.11 crores in Q4 FY25. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sterlite Technologies Q4 FY26: Stellar Turnaround Masks Lingering Valuation Concerns
item.description: Sterlite Technologies Ltd., a global leader in end-to-end data network solutions, delivered a remarkable turnaround in Q4 FY26 (January-March 2026), posting a consolidated net profit of ₹59.00 crores compared to a loss of ₹17.00 crores in the previous quarter—a sequential improvement that has sent the stock surging 4.60% in post-result trading to ₹298.05, just shy of its 52-week high of ₹299.15. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Indian Bank Q4 FY26: Steady Profit Growth Amid Asset Quality Concerns
item.description: Indian Bank Ltd., the Chennai-based public sector lender with a market capitalisation of ₹1.21 lakh crores, reported a net profit of ₹3,103.13 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a modest sequential growth of 1.36% over the previous quarter's ₹3,061.48 crores. On a year-on-year basis, the bank's bottom line expanded by 4.97% from ₹2,956.07 crores in Q4 FY25. However, the stock tumbled 2.23% following the results announcement, closing at ₹876.10 on April 29, 2026, as investors digested mixed signals from deteriorating asset quality metrics despite steady profitability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Indian Overseas Bank Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Indian Overseas Bank Ltd. (IOB), the Chennai-based public sector lender with a market capitalisation of ₹68,091 crores, delivered a robust performance in Q4 FY26, posting a net profit of ₹1,505.45 crores—a stellar 43.23% year-on-year (YoY) surge and 10.28% sequential growth from Q3 FY26. Despite the impressive earnings momentum, the stock has struggled to gain investor confidence, trading at ₹35.13 as of April 29, 2026, down 8.25% over the past year and significantly underperforming the public sector banking index, which rallied 25.63% during the same period. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Summit Securities Q4 FY26: Sharp Loss Reverses Stellar Nine-Month Run
item.description: Summit Securities Ltd., a Mumbai-based non-banking financial company specialising in investments in shares and securities, reported a jarring fourth-quarter loss that erased much of the optimism built during an otherwise exceptional nine-month performance in FY26. The company posted a net loss of ₹23.24 crores in Q4 FY26, a dramatic reversal from the ₹17.02 crores profit recorded in Q3 FY26, representing a sequential decline of 236.55%. Year-on-year, the loss widened by 400.86% compared to a ₹4.64 crores loss in Q4 FY25. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Fabtech Technologies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Fabtech Technologies Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show a significant recovery with a net profit of ₹22.06 crores and record revenue of ₹158.52 crores, but the company's history of volatility and reliance on other income raises concerns about sustainability. Overall, while the recent performance is positive, it may not indicate a stable trend, warranting close monitoring in future quarters. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd's latest results show strong profit growth of 102.47% year-on-year, with a net profit of ₹22.98 crores, but revenue growth is modest at 1.70% and there are concerns about high debt and declining operating margins, indicating mixed performance overall. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Canara Robeco Asset Management Company's latest Q4 FY26 results show a significant decline in net profit and revenue, marking the second consecutive quarter of contraction. However, their full-year performance remains strong with substantial year-on-year growth, indicating underlying strength despite recent challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Ltd's latest results are strong, with a net profit of ₹392.38 crores and a revenue increase of 62.25% year-on-year, marking the highest quarterly performance in the company's history. However, the company also saw a significant rise in long-term debt, which requires careful monitoring. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd's latest results show strong year-on-year growth in net profit (35.6%) and sales (32.79%), but a sequential decline in sales raises concerns about sustainability. Overall, the performance is solid, yet the high valuation and recent sales drop warrant cautious optimism regarding future growth. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Go Digit General Insurance Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Go Digit General Insurance Ltd's latest results show growth in net sales and profit, but significant operational losses in core underwriting and reliance on non-operating income raise concerns about the sustainability of its financial health. Overall, the results are mixed, indicating underlying challenges despite positive headline figures. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Fedbank Financial Services Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd's latest Q4 FY25 results show strong profit and revenue growth, with a net profit of ₹100.53 crores and a 14.96% year-on-year increase in net sales. However, concerns about its high debt-to-equity ratio of 4.67 and lack of transparency regarding asset quality metrics suggest caution for investors. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Leela Palaces Hotels & Resorts Ltd's latest results show strong operational performance with a 14.06% increase in net sales and a record operating margin of 54.84%, but concerns remain about capital efficiency with a low return on equity of 6.65% and recent stock underperformance. Overall, the company is performing well operationally, but faces challenges in market perception and valuation. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are AWL Agri Business Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: AWL Agri Business Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with net sales up 17.75% year-on-year, but profit margins have contracted, raising concerns about sustainability due to reliance on non-operating income. Overall, while revenue performance is solid, margin compression indicates potential challenges ahead. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Macfos Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Macfos Ltd's latest results are strong, with a net profit of ₹9.87 crores, a 102.67% year-on-year increase, and net sales of ₹102.14 crores, up 63.24%. The company also achieved its highest operating margin at 13.63%, indicating effective growth strategies and improved operational efficiency. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with net sales up 33.11% year-on-year, but significant margin compression to 8.23% raises concerns about operational efficiency and profitability. Investors should monitor these trends closely. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Star Health & Allied Insurance Company Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Star Health & Allied Insurance Company's latest results show a year-on-year sales growth of 13.92% but a decline in net profit by 13.17% from the previous quarter, indicating challenges in profitability despite revenue growth. Overall, the performance reflects mixed results amid rising costs and competitive pressures in the health insurance sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Piramal Pharma Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Piramal Pharma Ltd's latest results show stable revenue of ₹2,751.77 crores but a significant net loss of ₹8.83 crores, indicating serious profitability challenges despite a 28.60% sequential revenue growth. Concerns about operational efficiency and low returns on equity and capital employed suggest the company needs to address these issues for a sustainable turnaround. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Five-Star Business Finance Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Five-Star Business Finance Ltd's latest results indicate challenges, with a 2.80% decline in net profit and a significant drop in operating profit margins due to rising costs, despite increased interest income. The company needs to address operational inefficiencies to restore profitability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
item.description: {{list.post_excerpt}} Time: {{list.post_date_sep}}
